doctors.name: Dr. Kalpa Pandya
doctors.specialty: Maxillofacial Surgery & Head and neck Oncology
doctors.bio: Dr. Kalpa Pandya leads Shreshtha Dentistry with a focus on surgical precision and ethical, evidence-based care. With advanced training in Head & Neck Surgery, she brings hospital-grade expertise to every procedure — from complex extractions to rehabilitation.

doctors.name: Dr. Swetha R K
doctors.bio:
Dr. Swetha R K is a highly accomplished and award-winning dental professional in Chennai, known for her
commitment to excellence, ethical practice, and strong academic foundation. She completed her Bachelor of
Dental Surgery (BDS) from Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research and her Master’s in
Dentistry (MDS) from The Tamil Nadu Dr. MGR Medical University, and further enhanced her expertise with a
Fellowship in Medical Cosmetology from the University of Medicine, Greifswald, Germany. She has built a reputation for delivering high-quality, patient-centered dental care with a focus on precision, comfort, and long-term results.
Dr. Swetha stands out for her exceptional achievements in academic and research platforms, having secured multiple Best Paper Awards and Best Poster Presentation Awards at prestigious national and international conferences, reflecting her depth of knowledge, clinical insight, and excellence in presentation. Her work has
been widely appreciated in competitive academic forums, highlighting her ability to contribute meaningful, evidence-based advancements to modern dentistry. These repeated recognitions across various conferences underscore her dedication, consistency, and passion for continuous learning and professional growth.
In addition to her research accolades, she has been honored with the Young Dental Achiever Award (2023) and Best Student Awards from IDA Molaris in 2023 and 2024, further establishing her as a top-performing and well-recognized dental professional. She is also an author of the book “Pediatric Sports Dentistry” and has contributed to multiple reputed journals, demonstrating her ongoing commitment to academic excellence and
knowledge sharing. With expertise spanning preventive care, aesthetic dentistry, restorative treatments, and advanced dental procedures, Dr. Swetha combines clinical skill with a research-driven approach, making her a trusted choice for patients seeking comprehensive and high-quality dental care.
highlights: BDS — Sri Ramachandra Institute Of Education And Research
MDS — TN Dr. MGR Medical University
Fellowship in Medical Cosmetology, Greifswald, Germany
Authored a book titled "Pediatric Sports Dentistry"
